title: SolarPV Studio
description: A local web application for solar photovoltaic system simulation — systems architecture, solar physics, energy yield, financial modeling, and automated reporting.

title: Power Inverter Education
description: A live interactive course website covering grid-forming (GFM) and grid-following (GFL) inverters, high-power converter modeling, and 100% renewable grids. Built with Mohammed and Hakeem.

title: DataForge ETL
description: A local-first data pipeline and orchestration engine — connectors for CSV/JSON, REST APIs and databases, transformations, data quality checks, scheduling, and cataloguing.

title: ERP-Contractor: QHSE Operations Platform
description: A local-first QHSE operations platform for contractors — systems design, data architecture, compliance engine, KPI dashboards, and reporting.

title: Tuwaiq Mechatronics Project
description: A mechatronics project built during the Tuwaiq program — a browser-based Simon Says game demonstrating sequence logic, timing, and interactive control.

title: SAM-6 Solar UAV
description: Technical engineering report for a solar-electric, long-endurance unmanned aerial vehicle: systems engineering, aerodynamics, solar array sizing, power electronics, and energy analysis.

title: Senior Design Project
description: Solar Water Heating System with PCM-Based Thermal Energy Storage — design and development of a solar water heating system with PCM-based thermal energy storage.

title: Green Hydrogen: Production, Storage & Applications
description: A technical and economic assessment of green hydrogen production, storage, and applications in the energy transition (REE-405, Energy Conversion and Storage).

title: LCOE of the Saudi Vision 2030 PV Goal
description: How PV panel degradation rate, initial system efficiency, interest rate, and project location impact the levelized cost of electricity for the Saudi Vision 2030 PV target (REE-403, Economics of Energy Applications).

title: Combined Heat and Power (CHP)
description: Energy-efficiency course project analyzing combined heat and power systems — performance, fuel savings, and economics (REE-402, Energy Efficiency).

title: Solar Thermal System with Storage
description: Design and simulation of a solar thermal energy system, extending the base design with thermal storage and analyzing component connections and performance (REE-401), with 2D and 3D structural FEA of the assembly in Ansys.

title: Integrated Environmental Registry (ISO 14001:2015)
description: Professional HSE documentation: a complete environmental management system registry for an SEC-approved electrical contractor, aligned with ISO 14001:2015 and Saudi EMS requirements.

title: Loan Risk Assessment
description: Statistical modeling of credit scoring and probability of default — a complete framework for analyzing loan risk with risk-based decision systems (ISE-205, Statistics for Engineers).
